original_image_tags: Faint purple ink stamp, partially legible.

elements.description: Multiple overlapping ink stamps and handwritten annotations on a mostly blank page. Visible stamped text includes: 'S. DEPT OF JUSTICE', 'FBI', 'JUL 21 3 29 PM '47', 'RECEIVED-POSEN', 'U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE', 'JUL 21 5 28 PM '47', 'RECEIVED-MCDAW', 'FBI', 'DEPT OF JUSTICE', 'MR. JONES', 'JUL 22 9 08 AM '47', 'RECEIVED', 'FBI', 'S. DEPT OF JUSTICE', 'RECEIVED', 'INVESTIGATIVE DIVISION', 'OCT 1 11 47 AM '47', 'FBI', 'S. DEPT OF JUSTICE', 'DEPT. OF JUSTICE', 'FBI', 'OCT 1 19 PM '47'. The page also has two hole-punch marks at the top.

judge.reason: Description A states the stamp is 'faint' and 'partially legible,' while Description B provides extensive, specific, and legible quoted text that A does not see, indicating a clear contradiction on the visual content of the stamp.
